title: TC-PAIR-IMG-001: Verify headset image displays on Home Screen when Voyager Free 60+ is in pairing mode (no device connected)
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently connected to the phone (check Bluetooth settings and Poly Studio Mobile app).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home Screen UI state.
Place the Voyager Free 60+ earbuds in the charge case and close the lid.
Open the charge case lid and press and hold the Bluetooth button on the charge case touchscreen for 3 seconds until the LED flashes blue (pairing mode).
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen.
Observe the Home Screen for the presence of a headset product image/illustration of the Voyager Free 60+.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen displays a headset product image/illustration of the Voyager Free 60+ earbuds, guiding the user that a device is available for pairing. No placeholder, blank space, or generic icon is shown instead of the product image.

title: TC-PAIR-IMG-002: Verify headset image displays on Home Screen when Voyager Free 20 is in pairing mode (no device connected)
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently connected to the phone (check Bluetooth settings and Poly Studio Mobile app).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the Home Screen UI state.
Place the Voyager Free 20 earbuds in the charge case.
Open the charge case lid and press and hold the Bluetooth button on the case for 3 seconds until the LED flashes blue (pairing mode).
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen.
Observe the Home Screen for the presence of a headset product image/illustration of the Voyager Free 20.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen displays a headset product image/illustration of the Voyager Free 20 earbuds, guiding the user that a device is available for pairing. No placeholder, blank space, or generic icon is shown instead of the product image.

title: TC-PAIR-IMG-003: Verify headset image persists on Home Screen when Voyager Free 60+ remains in pairing mode and app is backgrounded/foregrounded
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently connected to the phone.
Place Voyager Free 60+ earbuds in pairing mode (open case lid, press and hold Bluetooth button on charge case touchscreen for 3 seconds until LED flashes blue).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and verify the headset product image is displayed on Home Screen.
Press the Home button on the phone to background the app.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from the app switcher or home screen.
Observe the Home Screen UI.
expected: The Voyager Free 60+ product image/illustration continues to be displayed on the Home Screen after the app is backgrounded and foregrounded, as long as the device remains in pairing mode.

title: TC-PAIR-IMG-004: Verify headset image transitions to connected device screen after pairing Voyager Free 60+ completes
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently connected to the phone.
Place Voyager Free 60+ earbuds in pairing mode (open case lid, press and hold Bluetooth button on charge case touchscreen for 3 seconds until LED flashes blue).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and verify the headset product image is displayed on Home Screen.
Tap the headset image or follow the on-screen pairing prompt to complete the Bluetooth pairing process.
Wait for the connection to be established (LED on charge case turns solid blue).
Observe the Home Screen UI after successful connection.
expected: After successful pairing and connection, the Home Screen transitions from displaying the pairing headset image to showing the connected device screen with the Voyager Free 60+ device name, battery status, and settings controls.

title: TC-PAIR-IMG-005: Verify headset image disappears from Home Screen when Voyager Free 60+ exits pairing mode (times out)
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently connected to the phone.
Place Voyager Free 60+ earbuds in pairing mode (open case lid, press and hold Bluetooth button on charge case touchscreen for 3 seconds until LED flashes blue).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and verify the headset product image is displayed on Home Screen.
Do not complete the pairing process.
Wait for the Voyager Free 60+ to exit pairing mode automatically (LED stops flashing — typically 2-3 minutes).
Observe the Home Screen UI in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: When the Voyager Free 60+ exits pairing mode (times out), the headset product image/illustration is no longer displayed on the Home Screen. The Home Screen returns to the initial state showing no device image or a 'No device connected' state.

title: TC-PAIR-IMG-006: Verify headset image displays correctly when Voyager Free 60+ is put into pairing mode while app is already open on Home Screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app with no device connected.
Observe the initial Home Screen state (no headset image expected).
Place the Voyager Free 60+ earbuds in the charge case.
Open the charge case lid and press and hold the Bluetooth button on the charge case touchscreen for 3 seconds until the LED flashes blue (pairing mode).
Wait 5 seconds without closing or backgrounding the app.
Observe the Home Screen UI for any automatic update.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen automatically detects the Voyager Free 60+ in pairing mode and displays the headset product image/illustration without requiring the user to close and reopen the app.

title: TC-PAIR-IMG-007: Verify headset image is correct for Voyager Free 60+ vs Voyager Free 20 (distinct product images)
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently connected to the phone.
Place Voyager Free 60+ earbuds in pairing mode (open case lid, press and hold Bluetooth button on charge case touchscreen for 3 seconds until LED flashes blue).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and observe the headset image displayed on Home Screen.
Note the specific product image shown (design, color, shape of earbuds and case).
Disconnect/forget the Voyager Free 60+ from Bluetooth settings.
Place Voyager Free 20 earbuds in pairing mode (open case lid, press and hold Bluetooth button on case for 3 seconds until LED flashes blue).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and observe the headset image displayed on Home Screen.
Compare the two product images.
expected: The Home Screen displays distinct product images for Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20 that accurately represent each product's unique design. The Voyager Free 60+ image shows the touchscreen charge case, while the Voyager Free 20 image shows its standard charge case without a touchscreen.

title: TC-PAIR-IMG-008: Verify headset image on Home Screen when Voyager Free 60+ is in pairing mode and phone rotates
steps: Ensure no Poly device is currently connected to the phone.
Place Voyager Free 60+ earbuds in pairing mode (open case lid, press and hold Bluetooth button on charge case touchscreen for 3 seconds until LED flashes blue).
Open Poly Studio Mobile app and verify the headset product image is displayed on Home Screen.
Rotate the phone from portrait to landscape orientation.
Observe the Home Screen UI in landscape mode.
Rotate the phone back to portrait orientation.
Observe the Home Screen UI in portrait mode.
expected: The Voyager Free 60+ headset product image/illustration remains displayed on the Home Screen during and after phone rotation. The image scales/repositions correctly for both portrait and landscape orientations without being cut off, distorted, or disappearing.
